description: Fix two auth bugs in twilio-api.ts: (1) isAuthenticated() checks stale localStorage instead of actual session state; (2) fetchProjectInfo() swallows all exceptions including ToolError.auth, hiding real auth failures from users.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/twilio && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Fix isAuthenticated() to check actual session state instead of stale localStorage
userStories.description: In plugins/twilio/src/twilio-api.ts, isAuthenticated() at lines 52-54 returns `getLocalStorage('accountSid') !== null`. This localStorage key may be stale or set from a previous session. The actual auth check requires fetching from /console/api/v2/projects/info, but isAuthenticated() is used for isReady() polling and must be fast. Fix isAuthenticated() to check the auth cache (populated by ensureAuth()) rather than raw localStorage.
acceptanceCriteria: isAuthenticated() checks the auth cache (getAuthCache) instead of raw localStorage
isReady() (which calls isAuthenticated()) correctly returns false when no auth credentials are cached
isReady() returns true after ensureAuth() has successfully populated the auth cache

userStories.title: Fix fetchProjectInfo() to not swallow ToolError exceptions
userStories.description: In plugins/twilio/src/twilio-api.ts, fetchProjectInfo() at lines 19-32 catches ALL exceptions (including ToolError.auth thrown by fetchFromPage on 401/403) and returns null. This causes ensureAuth() to throw a generic 'Not authenticated' message when in reality the /console/api/v2/projects/info endpoint returned a 403. Users see a misleading error that doesn't tell them the real cause. Re-throw ToolError instances instead of swallowing them.
acceptanceCriteria: fetchProjectInfo() re-throws ToolError exceptions (does not convert them to null)
fetchProjectInfo() still returns null for non-ToolError exceptions (network errors, parse failures)
ensureAuth() propagates ToolError.auth from fetchProjectInfo() correctly to the caller
